Functional.question: Which payment flows are in scope for phase 1 vs later (AR customer payments, AP vendor payments, refunds, chargebacks/disputes, recurring/subscriptions, deposits/prepayments)?
Functional.why_it_matters: Clarifies breadth of integration and workflow coverage so we can scope design, test cases, and rollout sequencing.
Functional.risk_if_unanswered: Scope creep, missed edge cases, and a solution that does not meet critical day-1 needs.

Functional.question: What payment methods must be supported (ACH, credit/debit cards, wires, RTP), and are there surcharges/convenience fees or cash-discounting rules?
Functional.why_it_matters: Determines provider capabilities, field mappings, and fee handling in AR/AP and GL.
Functional.risk_if_unanswered: Inability to accept preferred customer/vendor payment types; non-compliant fee handling.

Functional.question: Which user channels initiate payments (Acumatica AR screens, AP payment runs, customer portal, emailed pay links, call center, POS)?
Functional.why_it_matters: Drives UX patterns, security controls, and integration triggers (UI vs API vs workflow).
Functional.risk_if_unanswered: Poor adoption and fragmented experiences across channels.

Functional.question: Do you require authorization and later capture, or immediate sale/capture? Any partial captures or split payments?
Functional.why_it_matters: Impacts state machine, reconciliation logic, and invoice application in Acumatica.
Functional.risk_if_unanswered: Settlement mismatches and incorrect invoice status updates.

Functional.question: Will customers/vendors be tokenized for saved payment methods and one-click payments? Who will own/custody tokens?
Functional.why_it_matters: Affects PCI scope and token reference storage in Acumatica vs provider vault.
Functional.risk_if_unanswered: Expanded PCI scope and rework to align token custody with compliance.

Functional.question: What multi-company/branch scenarios, currencies, and countries are in scope?
Functional.why_it_matters: Determines configuration, GL mapping by entity, and FX handling across settlements.
Functional.risk_if_unanswered: Inconsistent postings and reporting across entities and currencies.

Functional.question: How should refunds (full/partial) and voids be initiated and approved? From Acumatica or provider portal?
Functional.why_it_matters: Defines directional sync and source of truth for financial reversals.
Functional.risk_if_unanswered: Double-refunds or orphaned reversals leading to reconciliation pain.

Functional.question: What reconciliation cadence and reports are required (daily funding, fees, chargebacks, settlements, payout batches)?
Functional.why_it_matters: Guides data ingestion, mappings to cash/clearing accounts, and month-end close.
Functional.risk_if_unanswered: Extended close cycles and manual reconciliations.

Functional.question: What approval workflows and segregation of duties are required for payment initiation, refunds, and vendor payment runs?
Functional.why_it_matters: Impacts Acumatica workflow setup, roles, and audit requirements.

Functional.question: Any industry-specific needs (e.g., Level 2/3 card data for B2B, surcharging rules by state, healthcare/education nuances)?
Functional.why_it_matters: Ensures interchange optimization and regulatory adherence.
Functional.risk_if_unanswered: Higher processing costs or legal exposure.

Technical.question: Which Acumatica edition/version and deployment model (SaaS vs on-prem/private cloud) are you running?
Technical.why_it_matters: Determines available APIs, deployment constraints, and upgrade compatibility.
Technical.risk_if_unanswered: Integration approach may be incompatible or brittle during upgrades.

Technical.question: Preferred integration pattern: native Acumatica customization, direct REST/contract-based API integration, or middleware/iPaaS?
Technical.why_it_matters: Impacts build timeline, maintainability, and total cost of ownership.
Technical.risk_if_unanswered: Over-engineered or under-scaled solution with poor operability.

Technical.question: Which payment provider(s)/gateway(s) are in scope and do you have API/webhook documentation and sandbox credentials?
Technical.why_it_matters: API capabilities and webhook reliability drive eventing, idempotency, and sync accuracy.
Technical.risk_if_unanswered: Delays in technical design and inability to validate end-to-end flows.

Technical.question: Expected transaction volumes, peak TPS, and latency/SLAs for posting and settlement ingestion?
Technical.why_it_matters: Guides scaling, batching strategy, and retry/backoff configurations.
Technical.risk_if_unanswered: Time-outs, throttling, and missed settlements under load.

Technical.question: How will webhooks/callbacks be delivered (security, retries, ordering, idempotency keys, DLQs)?
Technical.why_it_matters: Ensures reliable state synchronization between provider and Acumatica.
Technical.risk_if_unanswered: Duplicate or missing transactions; hard-to-debug race conditions.

Technical.question: Do you require SSO (SAML/OAuth) and role mapping for Acumatica users involved in payments?
Technical.why_it_matters: Affects authentication, provisioning, and least-privilege design.

Technical.question: What environments are available (dev/sandbox/UAT/prod) and how will data be masked for testing?
Technical.why_it_matters: Key for safe validation without exposing PAN/PII.
Technical.risk_if_unanswered: Test data risks and late defects in production.

Technical.question: Any network/security constraints (allowlists, proxies, private endpoints) for provider/API connectivity?
Technical.why_it_matters: Impacts connectivity design and deployment sequencing.
Technical.risk_if_unanswered: Firewall blocks and failed go-live cutovers.

Technical.question: Observability requirements (structured logs, metrics, traces, dashboards, alerting)?
Technical.why_it_matters: Supports proactive operations and SLA adherence.
Technical.risk_if_unanswered: Prolonged incidents and weak root-cause analysis.

Design_UX.question: Should payments be embedded within Acumatica screens (e.g., AR Invoice) or use hosted/redirect pages?
Design_UX.why_it_matters: Determines UX, PCI scope, and implementation complexity.
Design_UX.risk_if_unanswered: Inconsistent experience and unforeseen PCI obligations.

Design_UX.question: Do you need customer-facing payment links, QR codes, or portal flows with branding and responsive design?
Design_UX.why_it_matters: Defines external UX artifacts and branding deliverables.
Design_UX.risk_if_unanswered: Poor adoption and increased support volume.

Design_UX.question: What exception handling UX is required (declines, partial matches, duplicate detection, dispute queues)?
Design_UX.why_it_matters: Improves back-office efficiency and error resolution time.

Design_UX.question: What notifications and artifacts are needed (email/SMS receipts, statement descriptors, invoice attachments)?
Design_UX.why_it_matters: Impacts customer trust and reduces disputes.
Design_UX.risk_if_unanswered: Higher dispute rates and call center burden.

Design_UX.question: Accessibility and localization needs (WCAG, languages, date/number formats, time zones)?
Design_UX.why_it_matters: Ensures inclusive design and global usability.
Design_UX.risk_if_unanswered: Limited user adoption in certain regions or roles.

Design_UX.question: What training artifacts are required (quick-reference guides, in-app tips, videos) and who are target personas?
Design_UX.why_it_matters: Drives change management and reduces ramp time.

Design_UX.question: Branding constraints (logo usage, color palette, typography) for customer-facing payment experiences?
Design_UX.why_it_matters: Ensures consistency with corporate identity and trust.

Data.question: Which objects must be synchronized and their direction (customers, vendors, invoices, credit memos, cash receipts, payouts, fees, chargebacks)?
Data.why_it_matters: Establishes the canonical data model and API mappings.
Data.risk_if_unanswered: Gaps in end-to-end posting and reconciliation.

Data.question: What are the unique identifiers and idempotency keys for transactions and payouts?
Data.why_it_matters: Prevents duplicates and ensures safe retries.

Data.question: How should processor fees and chargebacks be represented in Acumatica (accounts, subaccounts, projects, branches)?
Data.why_it_matters: Affects GL accuracy and margin analysis.

Data.question: Net vs gross settlement preference and mapping to cash/clearing accounts?
Data.why_it_matters: Impacts reconciliation design and bank matching.
Data.risk_if_unanswered: Complex manual reconciliations and audit issues.

Data.question: Reporting requirements (cash application, DSO, settlement aging, dispute rates, success/decline metrics)?
Data.why_it_matters: Defines data retention and analytics needs.
Data.risk_if_unanswered: Inability to measure impact or optimize processes.

Data.question: Data retention, masking, and purge policies for PAN/PII and tokens within Acumatica and logs?
Data.why_it_matters: Key for PCI/GDPR compliance and storage footprint.

Data.question: Cutoff times, time zones, and posting dates for settlements and back-valuations?
Data.why_it_matters: Ensures accurate period close and FX treatment.

Data.question: Historical backfill/migration required (open invoices, customer tokens, outstanding disputes)?
Data.why_it_matters: Impacts project plan and validation effort.
Data.risk_if_unanswered: Go-live friction and parallel system dependencies.

Data.question: Master data ownership and quality rules (customer/vendor deduplication, address validation, bank details verification)?
Data.why_it_matters: Reduces settlement failures and ACH returns.

Data.question: Currency and FX handling (settlement currency vs invoice currency, exchange rate sources)?
Data.why_it_matters: Affects AR/AP postings and realized/unrealized gains/losses.

Security_Compliance.question: What PCI DSS scope and SAQ type are targeted, and who will handle card data (fully hosted vs embedded vs on-prem)?
Security_Compliance.why_it_matters: Defines architecture patterns to minimize PCI scope.
Security_Compliance.risk_if_unanswered: Overly complex compliance scope and cost.

Security_Compliance.question: Tokenization approach and custody (provider vault vs internal), and PAN masking policies?
Security_Compliance.why_it_matters: Reduces sensitive data exposure and audit scope.
Security_Compliance.risk_if_unanswered: Data leakage risk and failed assessments.

Security_Compliance.question: Required attestations and certifications (PCI DSS, SOC 2, ISO 27001) for vendors and integrator?
Security_Compliance.why_it_matters: Impacts vendor selection and procurement approval.

Security_Compliance.question: Access controls: MFA, RBAC/least privilege, segregation of duties, and privileged access monitoring?
Security_Compliance.why_it_matters: Protects payment initiation and refund workflows.

Security_Compliance.question: Encryption standards for data in transit and at rest, including key management and rotation?
Security_Compliance.why_it_matters: Core to protecting sensitive data and compliance.

Security_Compliance.question: Audit and traceability requirements (immutable logs, who-when-what for payments/refunds, retention windows)?
Security_Compliance.risk_if_unanswered: Insufficient evidence for audits and investigations.

Security_Compliance.question: Data residency and privacy obligations (GDPR/CCPA, regional hosting, cross-border transfers)?
Security_Compliance.why_it_matters: Influences provider choice and hosting strategy.

Security_Compliance.question: Security testing posture (SAST/DAST, pen tests, vulnerability mgmt, patch cadence)?
Security_Compliance.why_it_matters: Ensures ongoing security hygiene of integration components.

Security_Compliance.question: Incident response and BCDR requirements (RPO/RTO, runbooks, tabletop exercises)?
Security_Compliance.risk_if_unanswered: Extended downtime and financial impact during incidents.

Delivery_Governance.question: Who are the executive sponsor, product owner, finance lead, and technical owner? Any third-party participants (gateway/processor)?
What are the success criteria and KPIs (DSO reduction, auto-apply rate, reconciliation time, decline rate improvement)?
Target timeline, milestones, and any hard dates (quarter close, peak season freezes)?
Internal capacity and roles (SMEs, testers, admins) and required training/onboarding from Aziro?
Testing strategy (unit/integration/UAT), payment provider certification steps, and test data availability?
Change management plan and communications to Finance/AP/AR teams and customers/vendors?
Delivery_Governance.why_it_matters: Critical for adoption and minimal disruption.
Delivery_Governance.risk_if_unanswered: Resistance to change and higher support load.

Delivery_Governance.question: Go-live plan (cutover, parallel run, rollback) and hypercare duration/SLAs?
Delivery_Governance.why_it_matters: Reduces launch risk and ensures support readiness.

Delivery_Governance.question: Post-go-live ownership, monitoring, and continuous improvement cadence?
Delivery_Governance.risk_if_unanswered: Solution decay and rising operational cost.

Commercial_Assumptions.question: What is the budget range and funding model for this initiative?
Commercial_Assumptions.why_it_matters: Guides solution approach and phasing to fit constraints.

Commercial_Assumptions.question: Preferred commercial structure with Aziro (fixed price, T&M, capped T&M) and any milestone-based payments?
Any existing processor/gateway contracts, pricing tiers, or required volumes/commitments?
Commercial_Assumptions.why_it_matters: Influences provider selection and ROI modeling.

Commercial_Assumptions.question: Licensing implications (Acumatica ISV solutions, middleware/iPaaS, connector fees) and who procures them?
Commercial_Assumptions.why_it_matters: Ensures total cost clarity and timely procurement.

Commercial_Assumptions.question: Expected ROI and value targets (cash acceleration, fee reductions, operational savings)?
Commercial_Assumptions.why_it_matters: Prioritizes features that deliver measurable outcomes.

Commercial_Assumptions.question: Payment terms, invoicing cadence, and vendor onboarding requirements with your AP/Procurement team?
Any compliance or audit deadlines that influence budget/timing (PCI, SOC 2, external audit schedules)?
Preferred support model and budget post go-live (SLA, on-call windows, enhancement backlog)?
Commercial_Assumptions.why_it_matters: Sets ongoing run costs and service levels.

sales_ppt.deck_title: Embedded Payments for Acumatica: Secure, Automated, and Reconciliation-Ready
sales_ppt.executive_summary: You aim to integrate payment processing tightly with Acumatica to streamline AR/AP workflows, reduce manual reconciliation, and improve cash flow. Aziro proposes a secure, API-first integration leveraging Acumatica’s REST/contract-based APIs and provider webhooks to achieve real-time status updates, reliable data synchronization, and audit-ready reconciliation. Our approach is provider-agnostic, minimizes PCI scope through tokenization/hosted components, and is delivered in phases for rapid value realization.
sales_ppt.proposed_solution_theme: Accelerate finance operations by embedding secure, automated payment processing directly into Acumatica with reliable synchronization and reconciliation.
why_aziro: Deep ERP and finance integration expertise with Acumatica APIs and customization framework.
Payments domain knowledge (PCI, tokenization, settlements, disputes) to design compliant, low-risk solutions.
Provider-agnostic approach with patterns for major gateways and bank ACH rails.
Reconciliation accelerator for settlements, fees, chargebacks, and GL postings.
Robust delivery with testing harnesses, sandbox-first validation, and observability-by-default.
Proven agile playbook for phased go-lives with minimal business disruption.
differentiators: Prebuilt integration patterns for Acumatica AR/AP, including idempotent webhook ingestion and async retries.
Reconciliation and payout mapping accelerator that reduces month-end close by days.
Security-by-design: tokenization-first, hosted payment components, and least-privilege roles.
Operational telemetry pack (structured logs, dashboards, alerts) for fast incident resolution.
Vendor-agnostic design to avoid lock-in and enable future provider swaps.
Change management and training assets tailored for Finance/AP/AR teams.

slides.title: Integrated Payments in Acumatica: Vision and Outcomes
slides.purpose: Set context and align on the outcomes of an embedded payment solution.
key_bullets: Seamless AR/AP payment processing inside Acumatica
Real-time sync of authorizations, captures, payouts, and fees
Audit-ready reconciliation with reduced month-end effort
slides.speaker_notes: We will show how to embed secure payments in Acumatica to improve cash flow and reduce manual work, while keeping PCI scope minimal.

slides.title: Your Objectives and Success Metrics
slides.purpose: Confirm goals and define measurable KPIs for the initiative.
key_bullets: Reduce DSO and accelerate cash application
Improve first-try payment success and reduce declines
slides.speaker_notes: We will finalize targets during discovery; these drive scope and prioritization.

slides.title: Current Challenges and Risks
slides.purpose: Surface pain points to address with the integration.
key_bullets: Manual keying between gateway and Acumatica
Delayed status updates and posting mismatches
Limited visibility into fees, disputes, and payouts
slides.speaker_notes: These are common issues we solve with event-driven syncs and standardized mappings.

slides.title: Solution Overview
slides.purpose: Introduce the end-to-end approach and value pillars.
key_bullets: Hosted/tokenized payment capture to minimize PCI scope
Reconciliation accelerator for settlements, fees, and chargebacks
slides.speaker_notes: We will tailor the exact pattern to your provider and Acumatica version.

slides.title: Architecture Options
key_bullets: Native Acumatica customization vs REST integration
slides.speaker_notes: We recommend the lightest solution that meets scale and compliance needs.

slides.title: Data Flows and Object Mapping
slides.purpose: Show how invoices, payments, payouts, and fees synchronize.
key_bullets: Customer/vendor, invoice, payment, credit memo objects
Idempotent keys, retries, and duplicate prevention
Net vs gross settlement mapping to cash/clearing accounts
slides.speaker_notes: Accurate mapping is the backbone of reliable reconciliation and reporting.

slides.title: Security and Compliance by Design
slides.purpose: Demonstrate how the solution minimizes risk and audit scope.
key_bullets: Tokenization and hosted fields reduce PCI scope
RBAC, MFA, and immutable audit logs in Acumatica
slides.speaker_notes: We map controls to PCI and your internal audit requirements.

slides.title: Reconciliation and Reporting
slides.purpose: Explain daily funding, fees, chargebacks, and close process.
slides.speaker_notes: Our accelerator reduces manual effort and supports faster month-end close.

slides.title: Implementation Plan and Timeline
slides.purpose: Outline phased delivery with clear milestones.
slides.speaker_notes: Phased approach delivers value early and reduces go-live risk.

slides.title: Why Aziro
slides.purpose: Show credibility and fit for this work.
slides.speaker_notes: We bring reusable patterns that shorten timelines and reduce risk.

slides.title: Use Case: AR Customer Payments
slides.purpose: Illustrate AR flow from authorization to reconciliation.
key_bullets: Capture payments from invoice/sales order screens
Auto-apply to invoices and update status in real time
Ingest settlements and fees for GL posting
slides.speaker_notes: This use case improves cash application speed and accuracy.

slides.title: Use Case: AP Vendor ACH Runs
slides.purpose: Demonstrate AP payment automation and status sync.
key_bullets: Initiate ACH batches from Acumatica pay runs
slides.speaker_notes: Reduces manual follow-up and provides clear cash position.

slides.title: Risks and Mitigations
slides.purpose: Proactively address key delivery and technical risks.
slides.speaker_notes: We build reliability into the architecture and support model.

slides.title: Next Steps and Commercials
slides.purpose: Align on path forward and engagement model.
slides.speaker_notes: We can mobilize quickly once sandbox and stakeholders are confirmed.

use_cases.title: AR Customer Payments with Real-Time Sync and Reconciliation
use_cases.customer_problem: AR teams manually key payments from a gateway into Acumatica, causing delays, mismatches, and slow cash application.
use_cases.aziro_solution: Embed tokenized/hosted payment capture in Acumatica AR screens, use provider webhooks and idempotent APIs to auto-apply receipts, and ingest settlements/fees to GL via a reconciliation accelerator.
use_cases.business_value: Faster DSO, fewer posting errors, reduced manual effort, and audit-ready reconciliation.
use_cases.why_relevant_here: Directly addresses the need for seamless payment processing and reliable data synchronization with Acumatica.

use_cases.title: AP Vendor ACH Automation with Status Visibility
use_cases.customer_problem: AP runs ACH outside Acumatica with limited status feedback, leading to blind spots on returns and manual reconciliations.
use_cases.aziro_solution: Trigger ACH batches from Acumatica, receive acknowledgements/returns via secure webhooks, and auto-reconcile payouts to bank statements with exception queues.
use_cases.business_value: Improved cash control, fewer AP errors, and accelerated close.
use_cases.why_relevant_here: Expands integration beyond AR to cover end-to-end payment workflows within ERP.

use_cases.title: Recurring Billing and Autopay for Subscriptions
use_cases.customer_problem: Manual recurring charges and renewals create churn risk and inconsistent revenue recognition.
use_cases.aziro_solution: Leverage provider vault tokens to schedule autopay runs, sync attempts and outcomes to Acumatica, and manage retries/notifications automatically.
use_cases.business_value: Predictable cash collection, lower involuntary churn, and less back-office work.
use_cases.why_relevant_here: Common extension once core AR payments are live; uses the same integration and reconciliation patterns.
